For You,My Everything

Every petal holds a whisper of how much you mean to me

scroll
✦ a letter from the heart ✦

There are no words grand enough to hold what I feel for you — but I will spend a lifetime trying to find them. You are the reason I believe in something beautiful, the quiet miracle I never knew I was waiting for.

In a world full of noise, you are my favourite silence. In a world full of ordinary days, you are the most extraordinary thing that has ever happened to me.

You don't just complete me — you make me want to become someone worthy of standing beside you.

— with all my heart, Oni 🌸
